# awesome-ai-api (full dump for LLMs)

> Full, machine-readable leaderboard of AI API gateways, formatted for LLM ingestion.
> Snapshot: 2026-05-20 14:06 SGT. Total: 205. API-confirmed: 101.
> Canonical site: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
> Source repo: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
> License: MIT (code) + CC0 (data)

## Top 50 Gateways (sorted by score)

1. 老张API — https://api.laozhang.ai — score 9.9, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 177ms, uptime 100.0% over 28 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, grok
2. TiMi CC — https://timicc.com — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine unknown, latency 179ms, uptime 100.0% over 28 samples, models: gpt, qwen
